name: bootstrap-empty-project-stack-discovery
purpose: When the project is effectively empty, the interview should ask a few setup-defining questions up front because there is no codebase to inspect.

notes: No meaningful code or tool config exists yet.
The first interview must discover package_manager, runtime, and stack choices from the developer.

checks: Blank projects should ask more up front than existing repositories.
The interview should explicitly discover package manager and runtime because there is no code to infer them from.
